title: ziziphora puschkinii
intro: Ziziphora puschkinii, also known as Torkh or Mountain Balsam, is a flowering plant in the mint family that is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ziziphora puschkinii include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Ziziphora puschkinii are often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
